title: phlox nivalis subsp. hentzii
intro: Phlox nivalis subsp. hentzii, also known as Hentz's Phlox, is a flowering plant species within the phlox genus. It is a type of herbaceous perennial that has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, and also has been traditionally used to treat colds and respiratory issues. Hentz's Phlox can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
